place: North Chaweng, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Contemporary 4-Bedroom Seaview Villa Above North Chaweng
note: Live-in staff · panoramic sea views · 779 m² of living space
blurb: A sleek contemporary villa set high on a hillside estate above North Chaweng, opening to panoramic ocean views across 779 m² of living space. Four en-suite master bedrooms with private balconies, four and a half bathrooms, and an open-plan living area that flows to a wide pool deck with sun loungers — discreet live-in staff and easy reach of Chaweng's beach, sleeping up to eight.
detail:
Set within a prestigious gated estate in the hills of North Chaweng, this four-bedroom villa was designed around its outlook — a broad, uninterrupted sweep of the sea framed by clean contemporary architecture. Across 779 m² of living space, high ceilings, ceiling fans and floor-to-ceiling glass draw in the light and the island breeze, keeping the interiors cool and open to the view.

The pool deck is the heart of the house: a generous swimming pool wrapped in a wooden terrace, with sun loungers and a sunken bench positioned to catch the sun through the day and the colours of the water beyond. The open-plan living and dining area, served by a modern kitchen, flows straight out to the poolside for an easy indoor-outdoor rhythm.

Each of the four master bedrooms has its own private balcony, built-in wardrobes and an en-suite bathroom with twin basins and a walk-in rain shower, and every room is fitted with both ceiling fans and air conditioning. Discreet live-in staff quarters keep service close at hand without intruding on the privacy of the stay.

This is a home for peaceful stays rather than parties — shoes off indoors, quiet evenings, and long days by the pool. Chaweng's beach, restaurants and shops are a short drive down the hill, while the villa itself stays calm, private and firmly turned toward the sea.

features.l: Panoramic ocean views from a hillside estate
Four en-suite master bedrooms with balconies
Four and a half bathrooms with rain showers
Large pool with wooden sun deck
